examples: One of the ways the parasite spreads is through faecal matter.
The faecal filth of salmon farming has driven wild salmon from many of the sea lochs and rivers of Scotland.
A study has found that nearly one in 10 bank CARDS contains faecal matter.
The virus is passed from dog to dog and can be contracted by contaminated dog faecal matter.
The virus is highly contagious and spreads through the faecal-oral route - via contaminated water or food.
